7.reason: [The condition should be `top == -1` to check if the stack is empty, not `top == 0`. When `top == -1`, the stack is empty; when `top == 0`, there's one element.]

13.reason: [The loop condition should check for `!= EOF` to properly detect end-of-input. Using just `scanf(...)` may lead to infinite loops or undefined behavior on input failure.]
